examples.title: K-Means Algorithm
examples.code:
ALGORITHM K-Means
BEGIN
  1. Initialize k centroids
  2. REPEAT
    a. Assign points to nearest centroid
    b. Recalculate centroids
  3. UNTIL centroids stabilize
END

examples.title: Hierarchical Clustering with Scikit-Learn
examples.code:
from sklearn.cluster import AgglomerativeClustering
model = AgglomerativeClustering(n_clusters=3, linkage='ward')
labels = model.fit_predict(X)
examples.explanation: Using Ward's method for variance minimization
